name: Update-List

options.name: -Add
options.description: Specifies the property values to be added to the collection. Enter the values in the order that they should appear in the collection.

options.name: -InputObject
options.description: Specifies the objects to be updated. You can also pipe the object to be updated to `Update-List`.

options.name: -Property
options.description: Specifies the property that contains the collection that's being updated. If you omit this parameter, `Update-List` returns an object that represents the change instead of changing the object.

options.name: -Remove
options.description: Specifies the property values to be removed from the collection.

options.name: -Replace
options.description: Specifies a new collection. This parameter replaces all items in the original collection with the items specified by this parameter.

description: Adds items to and removes items from a property value that contains a collection of objects.
